about.title: About Me
about.desc: I am an experienced Web Developer specializing in building web applications and information systems, including student management, tuition payment, attendance, and online admissions, with a focus on creating stable, efficient, and user-friendly solutions that truly meet user needs, while continuously learning the latest technologies to deliver optimal digital experiences.

exp_desc1: Managed core technical infrastructure, resolved hardware and software issues, and maintained local server operations to ensure daily administrative continuity.
exp_desc2: Engineered core institutional systems, including online admissions, student attendance trackers, and tuition payment integration using Laravel and React.
exp_desc3: Directed a multi-disciplinary development squad, optimized deployment lifecycles, and established strict workflow procedures to ensure on-time delivery.
srv_subtitle: Custom end-to-end engineered web solutions developed since 2018
srv_d1: Architecting high-performance e-commerce platforms, customized corporate websites, and travel booking applications tailored to deployment specs.
srv_d2: Engineering integrated Point of Sale (POS) infrastructure featuring automated stock management, real-time logistics, and barcode scanning systems.
srv_d3: Building secure applications for academic institutions, managing multi-tier online admissions, tuition billing portals, and student reporting trackers.
srv_d4: Constructing isolated REST API layers, WhatsApp automation gateways using Node.js, and server infrastructure utilizing Docker and Linux VPS environments.
port_subtitle: Selected core applications and systems architecture
mdl_spp_desc: This SPP management application is designed to simplify financial administration at the pesantren. With a simple interface, it allows staff to record, monitor, and manage student payments efficiently. Each transaction is recorded in real-time, enabling easy tracking of payment status.
mdl_ppdb_desc: The PPDB application is designed to streamline the enrollment process for new students at the pesantren. With an intuitive interface, prospective students and parents can complete online registration forms, upload required documents, and track status easily.
mdl_rapor_desc: The Student Report application is designed to simplify the management and monitoring of student progress at the pesantren. With comprehensive features, administrators can record grades, attendance, and important notes for each student.
mdl_inv_desc: This inventory management application is designed to help efficiently manage stock in retail stores. With an integrated system, store owners and staff can record incoming and outgoing items, monitor stock levels in real-time, and organize product categories easily.
mdl_pos_desc: This POS application is designed to facilitate sales transactions and manage inventory in retail stores in an integrated manner. By combining cashier operations and stock management, store owners can record every sale in real-time.
mdl_trv_desc: This travel management application is designed to simplify the management of Umrah and Hajj trips. With comprehensive features, travel agencies can schedule departures, manage pilgrim data, and monitor payment status easily.
